course_descriptor: LazyEarn track, curated Jim Rohn compilation playlist
deliverable_target: a faithful, source-conscious chapter for Jim Rohn - Originals - No Ai, plus a per-course compiled PDF book.
visual_target: selected frames are supporting evidence for titles, on-screen captions, seminar context, and speaker identity; do not let them override the spoken content.
mathematical_standard: preserve concrete claims and business details when present, but avoid inventing formal finance or economics exposition that is not in the source.
style_target: notes should read like a careful companion text for personal discipline, ambition, sales framing, and self-management, with explicit separation between anecdote, motivational rhetoric, and concrete mechanism.
credit_target: keep explicit credit to Jim Rohn for the original talks, note that the source is a curated playlist rather than a clean institutional course, and preserve curation credit to LazyingArt LLC.
front_matter_single: Original talk by Jim Rohn, sourced from a curated playlist. Lecture notes organized by \href{https://lazying.art}{LazyingArt LLC}.
front_matter_plural: Original talks by Jim Rohn, sourced from a curated playlist. Lecture notes organized by \href{https://lazying.art}{LazyingArt LLC}.
reference_missing_text: No directly matching reference PDF is available for this course.
reference_no_match_text: Matching course reference PDFs were found, but no strong topical excerpt was automatically matched for this lecture.
reference_budget_text: Matching course reference PDFs were found, but no excerpt fit within the current prompt budget.
